terminal_adjudication.reason: The corrected seller POST contracts are accessible: both relay schemes returned HTTP 200/application code 0 daily samples, and the Replay POST route returned the required field sets for short 510300.SH fund_basic, fund_daily, and fund_adj observations. The fund_nav sample timed out once without retry. Non-retained inline probe code makes these route observations noncontrolling; three-symbol historical coverage, unique product identity, factor construction, calendar, suspension, limit, distribution, other-action, revision, and deterministic snapshot semantics remain unqualified, so the matrix is still incomplete.
terminal_adjudication.next_action: Close Cycle 4 without import or outcome access. The corrected POST contracts may be reused only by a separately frozen future acquisition task; this smoke does not authorize bulk retrieval or database publication.

central_qfq_cross_check.reason: The cited rows are qfq-derived and do not provide a separate raw-price plus factor/construction identity.

ephemeral_probe_code_status.reason: The historical temporary scripts and the current inline smoke code are absent. Their aggregate observations remain noncontrolling route notes only. The secret-free contract below records the request shape, but it is not a code hash or independently replayable qualification artifact.

seller_scheme_fastapic_post.parser_and_retention: Retain only HTTP status, content type, response byte count, and SHA256; do not retain body or secret.

seller_scheme_replay_get.parser_and_retention: Retain only HTTP status, content type, response byte count, and SHA256; do not retain body or secret.

request_contract.parser_and_retention: Parse JSON in memory without duplicate-key enforcement; retain only endpoint identity, transport/application status, elapsed time, field names, aggregate row/date/null/duplicate counts, response byte count, and SHA256; never retain response body, row values, or credential material.

parser_and_aggregate_rules: Require data.klines to be a list.
For each row, take the date as the substring before the first comma.
Compute field width as len(row.split(',')) without interpreting field semantics.
Retain only row count, first date, last date, distinct field widths, response byte count, and response SHA256.
eastmoney_push2his_candidate.qualification_limit: Route and coverage shape only; no null, duplicate, unit, adjustment, event, or row-semantic qualification.

dataset_matrix.finding: The corrected Replay POST route exposed the documented fund_basic field set and an observed list date, but two rows shared the same ts_code/list_date key. Aggregate-only retention cannot adjudicate the duplicate, the per-request retrieval timestamp was not captured, and official primary marker proof remains absent.
Observed source label is AKSHARE_TOOL_TRADE_DATE_HIST_SINA, not accepted official SSE identity.

The corrected Replay POST route exposed seven rows with the required fields, no observed null cells, and no duplicate symbol/date keys; the current official contract defines OHLC in CNY. Full 2018-2026 three-symbol coverage, retained row identity, per-request retrieval time, and historical available_at remain absent.

The current official contract defines vol as lots and the short field-set observation contained no null cells, but full history, retained deterministic rows, and per-request retrieval time were not collected.

The current official contract defines amount as thousand CNY and the short field-set observation contained no null cells, but full history, retained deterministic rows, and per-request retrieval time were not collected.

The corrected Replay POST route exposed seven rows with the required factor fields, no observed null cells, and no duplicate symbol/date keys, but the official document does not freeze factor base, construction formula, or underlying cash-distribution event identity; fund_nav timed out and no full history or per-request retrieval time was retained.
An absent accepted-session bar cannot prove suspension.
